Defines the UriError.prototype built-in object and its properties for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines the properties and identifiers for the `UriError.prototype` object in a JavaScript engine. It uses macros to define object and string values associated with the `UriError` prototype, which is part of the ECMAScript standard. The `OBJECT_ID` macro assigns an identifier to the `UriError.prototype`, while the `OBJECT_VALUE` and `STRING_VALUE` macros define the constructor, name, and message properties of the `UriError` object. These properties are marked as configurable and writable, allowing them to be modified in JavaScript code. The file concludes by undefining the macros to prevent conflicts with other parts of the codebase.
